SELECT am.schemaname, md.view_name, dd.depth + $13, dd.path || md.view_name
JOIN dependency_depth dd ON md.depends_on = dd.view_name
JOIN all_mvs am ON am.matviewname = md.view_name

-- Skip views that timed out or had errors during Phase 1
-- Identify views by temporal granularity based on naming patterns
-- This enables stratified sampling across time periods
CROSS JOIN LATERAL cia_classify_temporal_view(vc.viewname) AS c
-- CHANGED: Include ALL views, even empty ones (for header-only CSV files)
-- WHERE vc.row_count > 0  -- REMOVED: No longer skip empty views
-- Automatically detect temporal columns in each view
AND c.column_name NOT IN ($16 /*, ... */) -- Exclude technical columns
-- 1. Complete extraction for small views (< threshold)
-- 2. Extended samples for analytical trend views (election proximity, seasonal activity, career trajectory)
-- Extended samples for analytical trend views (500 rows for better temporal coverage)
WHEN vtc.viewname ILIKE $20 OR vtc.viewname ILIKE $21 THEN
WHEN vtc.viewname ILIKE $23 OR vtc.viewname ILIKE $24 THEN
WHEN vtc.viewname ILIKE $26 OR vtc.viewname ILIKE $27
WHEN vtc.viewname ILIKE $30 OR vtc.viewname ILIKE $31 THEN
WHEN vtc.viewname ILIKE $33 OR vtc.viewname ILIKE $34 THEN
WHEN vtc.viewname ILIKE $36 OR vtc.viewname ILIKE $37
WHEN vtc.viewname ILIKE $45 OR vtc.viewname ILIKE $46 THEN $47
WHEN vtc.viewname ILIKE $48 OR vtc.viewname ILIKE $49 THEN $50
WHEN vtc.viewname ILIKE $51 OR vtc.viewname ILIKE $52
WHEN vtc.viewname ILIKE $55 OR vtc.viewname ILIKE $56 THEN $57
WHEN vtc.viewname ILIKE $58 OR vtc.viewname ILIKE $59 THEN $60
WHEN vtc.viewname ILIKE $61 OR vtc.viewname ILIKE $62
CASE WHEN vtc.viewname LIKE $66 THEN vtc.viewname ELSE $67 || vtc.viewname END AS file_prefix
